final:
module sram_16bit (  
    input clk,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    input we,  // write enable  
    input re,  // read enable  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15];  // 16 x 16-bit SRAM  

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory[addr] <= data_in ; // Write data to address
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (re) begin data_out <= memory[addr] ; // Read data from address
  end
  end  
endmodule
